title: Best Media and Communication College in Noida, Uttar Pradesh
content: School of Media and Communication Studies at Galgotias University has been included among the four best media private Institutions listed by the reputed magazine India Today for the promotion of practical and field-based education. It provides state-of-art facilities for the students to contribute to quality-based media content. It offers ample opportunities to gain practical work experience through industry-oriented curriculum, internships, industrial visits, master class with industry experts and placements in prominent media organizations. The programs include transmedia storytelling, strategic communication, fiction & TV production, advertising, corporate communication, public speaking and street-play, communication research, and other traditional courses in Mass Communication. We also offer specializations in various subjects like journalism, entertainment & strategic communication. During the program, the students are exposed to integration of theoretical as well as practical knowledge. The course also provides hands-on training to build and develop media skills for gaining global perspective to newer learning standards. The course imparts aspiring filmmakers with the latest knowledge and techniques in Film Technology. It also provides training in multidimensional aspects of the Film and Television Industry while helping students to acquire the required skills, confidence, and poise. The courses are designed to develop students into mature professionals equipped with the required abilities to meet their professional goals. An amalgamation of Industry experienced & research-based faculty members facilitate students to produce high-quality project work that matches professional standards and goals. We also provide students with practical exposure right from the beginning, so that the students can build confidence, enhance their personalities, and build journalistic approach towards their career. We are focused on developing critical thinking ability, employed intelligence in crafting communication. Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education.
